'''âth-w-t-ng''' ('''kathawtengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chanticleer|chanticleer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chanticleer|chanticleer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-w-t-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kathawtengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithawtengoko|thithawtengoko]] || [[word:jithawtengoko|jithawtengoko]] || [[word:shithawtengoko|shithawtengoko]] || [[word:kithawtengoko|kithawtengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
